response.justification: The candidate has extensive full-stack experience with relevant technologies such as TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB. They have worked on projects that involve scalability, performance improvements, and integration with various APIs and services. Their experience in AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling is also a plus.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with relevant technologies
Proven track record of scalability and performance improvements
Experience with AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling
concerns: Limited direct experience with Nest.js and Vitest
No explicit mention of experience with Kotlin/Java for backend services
Some projects and experiences are outside the primary stack
